details.note: Added icon field to CommandOption/CommandCatalogItem, AI_COMMANDS constant with 8 AI actions (explain, refactor, test, fix, deploy, review, commit, search), auto-registration in CommandProvider.init with dispatchAiCommand routing
Universal command palette with dual-mode input (/→AI, path→file search, default→all), categorized sections with icons/descriptions/keybind badges, type-safe IconName union
